title: M.O.O.N. Sgt. leaving field returns linked Limited Summon

card.rawText: When summoned, you may summon 1 "M.O.O.N." named creature from your hand or deck as a Limited Summon. Return the summoned creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

effect.value: When summoned, you may summon 1 "M.O.O.N." named creature from your hand or deck as a Limited Summon. Return the summoned creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.
